closed_world.quote: As usual, I took a cab... The nonagenarian simply sat left to me.

resolution.value: Old woman's curiosity about narrator's gender resolved through direct questioning
resolution.quote: She said I had a doubt that were U a boy or girl? Now my doubt had cleared.

investigator.value: First-person narrator questioning the old woman's behavior
investigator.quote: I started questioning myself who's this woman. What she wanted to ask me?

red_herring.value: Initial mystery setup about old woman's intentions misdirects from mundane gender confusion
red_herring.quote: I couldn't conceive of her as a mad witch

clue_fairness.value: Physical appearance clues presented to reader: long hair, suit concealing body shape
clue_fairness.quote: Strands were appearing like a puppy hair. And I wore a suit so she couldn't get my bodily integrity

reveal_mechanic.value: Direct confession reveals woman's actual concern about narrator's gender identity
reveal_mechanic.quote: She said I had a doubt that were U a boy or girl? Now my doubt had cleared

investigator_wound.value: Narrator's project stress and self-neglect creates vulnerability to misperception
investigator_wound.quote: Due to project tension I couldn't have cut my hair for a long time
